content.en:
"Shentai Divine Lord, I want to kill 100,000 god-level fierce beasts in the Ten Thousand Beasts God Realm alone, it's too exaggerated, right?"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

"Actually, it can be done!" "As long as you keep fighting, you can kill 100,000 god-level beasts in ten years, of course, you also have to protect yourself, some god-level beasts are not what you can deal with now!"

"If you are able to complete this indicator, the Supreme Hall of the Human Race is willing to reward you with a Heavenly Dao Script. "

The god lord of the platform said the reward.

"Heavenly Dao Text, which Heavenly Dao Text?" Ye Tian hurriedly asked.

"Wood Heavenly Dao Text!"

The Divine Lord said.

"Wood of the Heavenly Way Writing !!"

Ye Tian was very excited, this was exactly the Heavenly Dao text he was missing.

Now, he already has the Heavenly Dao Text of Gold, the Heavenly Dao Text of Water, the Heavenly Dao Text of Fire, the Heavenly Dao Text of Wood and the Heavenly Dao Text of Earth.

The Supreme Hall of the Human Race also knew that he lacked the Heavenly Dao Script of Wood and the Heavenly Dao Text of Earth, and deliberately made this reward, just because he was afraid that he would not go.

Strictly speaking, if Ye Tian really didn't go to the Ten Thousand Beasts God Realm, the Supreme Hall of the Human Race would not be able to force him.

The Supreme Hall of the Terran Race is not a compulsory organization, but in fact it is just a cultivation institution organized by the supremes of the human race.

The Terran Supreme Hall is not mandatory, so there is no restriction on His Highness's choice, even if you want to live in the Terran Supreme Palace.

"Shentai Divine Lord, I am willing to go to the Ten Thousand Beasts God Realm!"

Ye Tian immediately agreed.

In fact, he didn't think about refusing in the first place, but just asked casually, wanting to know a little more about the situation in the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm from the Shentai Divine Lord.

Now that the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race is willing to take out the Heavenly Dao Script of Wood as a reward, this is simply an unexpected surprise.

"Then I'll take you to the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm now!"

The Divine Lord said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

......

Ten Thousand Beasts Domain.

This star field is very special, it was originally completely occupied by countless fierce beast races, but it was later occupied by the human race.

The Terrans slaughtered those powerful beasts one after another, leaving only a large number of low-level beasts.

Even now, the Ten Thousand Beasts Domain also has countless fierce beasts, some of which are more cute and beautiful in appearance, and have even become the favorite of many female powerhouses in the entire human race.

Quite a few beasts are of high value and are sold in large quantities.

It can be said that the Ten Thousand Beasts Domain is a place to breed fierce beasts, and it is also the best place to trade fierce beasts.

On the road.

Ye Tian asked the Shentai Divine Lord: "Shentai Divine Lord, there are countless fierce beasts in the Ten Thousand Beasts Domain, will there be fierce beasts with mystery-level time talent?"

"I don't know about this, but I've heard of the sale of time talent beasts, but most of them are some top-level time talents or below, and the value is just like that. "

Obviously, a powerhouse at the level of the Shentai Divine Lord can't look down on a fierce beast with a top-level time talent at all.

However, the mystery-level time talent is still extremely rare, otherwise it is impossible for a cosmic god like the Shentai Divine Lord not to have heard of it.

Soon, Ye Tian and the Shentai Divine Lord came to the Ten Thousand Beasts Domain.

As soon as he came to the Ten Thousand Beasts Domain, Ye Tian's gaze saw an amazing picture through the spaceship.

In the starry sky of the vast sea, a huge golden bird comparable to a small planet flew at extreme speed in the starry sky.

"What's that?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The Shentai Divine Lord smiled and said: "That's the galaxy-level fierce beast Golden Silk Phoenix Eagle, such a flying galaxy-level fierce beast is the favorite mount of many cosmic gods! Just now a cosmic god passed by, I also know this cosmic god, I greeted him just now, but you can't spy on our level of communication!"

"It turned out to be a galaxy-level fierce beast, no wonder it was so domineering!"

Ye Tian sighed.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian and the Shentai Divine Lord to come to the Ten Thousand Beasts Continent in the Ten Thousand Beasts Domain.

Ten Thousand Beasts Continent, Ten Thousand Beasts Mountain Range.

Ye Tian was brought here by the Shentai Divine Master, and the two of them were waiting here.

"Shentai Divine Master, who are we waiting for?" Ye Tian was curious.

"The Ten Thousand Beast God Realm is not completely controlled by our Terran Supreme Temple, and now it is just being borrowed by us. Although I have a way to send you into the Ten Thousand Beasts God Realm, this is the Ten Thousand Beasts Continent after all, so naturally let the master here open the Ten Thousand Beasts God Realm. The Divine Lord explained.

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Bang!!!

A huge orangutan stepped on the ground and walked step by step.

That violent momentum made countless fierce beasts in this area flee frantically, even the great god-level fierce beasts did not dare to withstand this violent momentum.

Ye Tian saw the huge orangutan from a distance through the Void Eye.

Suddenly, the huge orangutan looked at Ye Tian, and a pair of eyes like stars stared at Ye Tian.

At this moment, Ye Tian seemed to be frozen, unable to move, and even the god-level spatial talent could not help him break free from this shackle.

"Golden Ape Divine Lord, long time no see!"

The god lord on the side spoke.

Swish!

The restraints disappeared, and Ye Tian was able to move.

At this time, the huge orangutan disappeared in an instant, and in a blink of an eye, it came to Ye Tian and the Shentai Divine Lord.

At this time, the momentum of this orangutan had already converged, as if it was just an ordinary giant orangutan.

Ye Tian only noticed at this time that there was a person standing on the shoulder of this orangutan.

This person has the appearance of a young man, his eyes are incomparably deep, and there is a faint golden light circulating.

The clothes he wore were inscribed with a golden ape, a golden ape pattern, as if he had come to life.

Ye Tian habitually used the copying talent to check the talent of this young man, but this check was immediately stunned.

Golden Ape: Yuan Tian

Bloodline Talent: Universe level

Strength Talent: God

Defense Talent: God-level

Speed Talent: Arcanon

Stick Talent: No superior

Golden Armor Talent: God-level

......

"It's not human!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

Is this Golden Ape Divine Lord a fierce beast disguised as a human, or is he living in the Ten Thousand Beasts Domain as a fierce beast in the open?

If it's the former, then it's a big problem, a fierce beast is disguised as a human, and it is also a fierce beast at the level of a cosmic god.

Once you cause a little trouble, it will be a huge loss to the Terrans.

If it's the latter, then it doesn't matter, since everyone knows if he's human or not, there's nothing to worry about.

At this time, the Golden Ape Divine Lord was present, and Ye Tian did not dare to ask the Shentai Divine Lord, so as not to offend this Golden Ape Divine Lord.

The Lord of the Divine Lord of the Tai and the Lord of the Golden Ape seemed to be good friends and chatted for a while.

Then the Shentai Divine Lord said: "The Golden Ape Divine Lord, this is His Highness Wanfa, the Eternal Ancient Level of our Terran Supreme Palace, this time the Terran Supreme Hall let him enter the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm for ten years, and also asked the Golden Ape Divine Lord to help open the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm." "

"It's a trifle!"

The Golden Ape God Lord patted his chest and said.

Immediately, the Golden Ape God Lord took out a token, which inspired a ray of light and shot into the void.

Bang!!!

A portal appeared in the void, and as long as you passed through this portal, you could enter the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm.

"Lord Tantai, I still have a little thing to be busy with, so I'll leave first. This portal can last for a day, and in ten years, I will come back to open the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm!"

With that, the Golden Ape Divine Lord and the gorilla vanished.

After the Golden Ape Divine Lord left, Ye Tian couldn't help but ask, "Shentai Divine Lord, what is the identity of this Golden Ape Divine Lord?"

"He's not a human being!" "He's not a human being!" said with a smile: "He's a big man's contract pet beast, and that big man is the real high-level of the human race! The strength is second only to the seventy-eight top existences of the human race, and I am just an ant in the eyes of the other party! Because of that person's identity, the Golden Ape Divine Lord can move freely in the Human Race area, and I have lived in the Ten Thousand Beasts Domain for a period of time, so I have made friends with this Golden Ape Divine Lord." "

As soon as the Shentai Divine Lord said this, Ye Tian was relieved.

"Shentai Divine Lord, I will enter the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm!"

Ye Tian turned around and flew into the portal and entered the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm.

Ten Thousand Beasts God Realm.

As soon as Ye Tian flew in, he saw a huge bloody mouth.

With Ye Tian's speed, if he didn't turn, he would just jump into this bloody mouth.

"I'm jumping into the mouth of the beast!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Fortunately, this fierce beast is not very powerful, it is just an emperor-level fierce beast, and its strength is about equivalent to that of a seven- or eight-star emperor-level.

"Die!"

Ye Tian's mind moved, and his spatial talent unfolded, forcibly shattering the body of this emperor-level fierce beast with a powerful spatial power.

Bang!

This emperor-level fierce beast turned into countless blood mist, and drifted out one by one, without letting Ye Tian stain a trace of blood.

"Roar!!

All around, a large number of fierce beasts poured in, apparently smelling blood.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian left quickly.

Although he entered the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm to kill 100,000 god-level fierce beasts, he was not in a hurry.

Immediately.

He used his camouflage talent to turn into an emperor-level beast and quickly left.

The camouflage talent is very useful, and it is even more useful in a place like the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm now.

If a human enters here, once a god-level beast is killed, if the news spreads, there will definitely be countless god-level beasts surrounding and killing.

But if he used his camouflage talent to turn into an emperor-level fierce beast and kill other god-level fierce beasts, even if the news spread, the fierce beasts here would only marvel at the terrifying nature of this emperor-level fierce beast, and there would be no siege and killing of a large number of god-level fierce beasts.

No one knows how many powerful god-level beasts there are in the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm, if it is reckless, let alone killing 100,000 god-level beasts, even if it is a matter of living for ten years.
